methods.Set cellSet(): Returns a set of all row key / column key / value triplets.
methods.void clear(): Removes all mappings from the table.
methods.Map column(C columnKey): Returns a view of all mappings that have the given column key.
methods.Set columnKeySet(): Returns a set of column keys that have one or more values in the table.
methods.Map columnMap(): Returns a view that associates each column key with the corresponding map from row keys to values.
methods.boolean contains(Object rowKey, Object c: Returns true if the table contains a mapping with the specified row and column keys.
methods.boolean containsColumn(Object columnKey): Returns true if the table contains a mapping with the specified column.
methods.boolean containsRow(Object rowKey): Returns true if the table contains a mapping with the specified row key.
methods.boolean containsValue(Object value): Returns true if the table contains a mapping with the specified value.
methods.boolean equals(Object obj): Compares the specified object with this table for equality.
methods.V get(Object rowKey, Object columnKey): Returns the value corresponding to the given row and column keys, or null if no such mapping exists.
methods.int hashCode(): Returns the hash code for this table.
methods.boolean isEmpty(): Returns true if the table contains no mappings.
methods.V put(R rowKey, C columnKey, V value): Associates the specified value with the specified keys.
methods.void putAll(Table table): Copies all mappings from the specified table to this table.
methods.V remove(Object rowKey, Object columnKey: Removes the mapping, if any, associated with the given keys.
methods.Map row(R rowKey): Returns a view of all mappings that have the given row key.
methods.Set rowKeySet(): Returns a set of row keys that have one or more values in the table.
methods.Map rowMap(): Returns a view that associates each row key with the corresponding map from column keys to values.
methods.int size(): Returns the number of row key / column key / value mappings in the table.
methods.Collection values(): Returns a collection of all values, which may contain duplicates.
